The '''Domain Hul worldship''' was the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]] possessed by [[Domain Hul]].

==History==
Unlike other worldships at the time of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the Domain Hul had one distinct difference—it was healthy, and could participate in battle. As such, [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]] selected it to serve as the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Supreme Commander (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Supreme Commander]] [[Czulkang Lah]], his father, during the [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; Second)|Battle of Borleias]]. During the campaign, [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Eldo Davip]] developed [[Operation Emperor's Spear]], where they would have the ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'' ram the worldship, in an attempt to both destroy a healthy worldship and kill Czulkang Lah. The operation was a success, and the Domain Hul was destroyed.
